---
title: "Academy Courses"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Comprehensive technical training programs"
description: "Explore comprehensive courses in cybersecurity, open-source development, Linux administration, data privacy, and security awareness training."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Academy <span class="gr">Courses</span></h1>
    <p>Comprehensive, multi-week programs that build deep expertise through hands-on projects and expert instruction.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Seven courses, one goal</h2>
    <p class="sub">Practical skills taught by practitioners, not textbooks.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i><h3>Open Source Development</h3><p>Git workflows, licensing, and contributing to real projects. 8 weeks.</p><a href="/academy/courses/open-source-development/" class="m-lk">Course details</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-lock"></i><h3>Practical Cybersecurity</h3><p>Network security, pentesting, and incident response. 12 weeks.</p><a href="/academy/courses/practical-cybersecurity/" class="m-lk">Course details</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-terminal"></i><h3>Unix/Linux Administration</h3><p>Shell scripting, service management, and performance tuning. 10 weeks.</p><a href="/academy/courses/unix-linux-administration/" class="m-lk">Course details</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-lock"></i><h3>Data Protection & Privacy</h3><p>GDPR, CCPA, privacy-by-design, and breach response. 6 weeks.</p><a href="/academy/courses/data-protection-privacy/" class="m-lk">Course details</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-people"></i><h3>Human Firewall</h3><p>Security awareness, social engineering defense, and culture building. 4 weeks.</p><a href="/academy/courses/human-firewall-security-awareness/" class="m-lk">Course details</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-bug"></i><h3>Cyberhygiene Essentials</h3><p>Digital threat awareness, device protection, and safe practices. 6 weeks.</p><a href="/academy/courses/cyberhygiene-essentials/" class="m-lk">Course details</a></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="row g-5 mt-2 justify-content-center">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-snow"></i><h3>NixOS for Cybersecurity</h3><p>Declarative security, reproducible environments, and system hardening. 4 weeks.</p><a href="/academy/courses/nixos-cybersecurity/" class="m-lk">Course details</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Three ways to learn</h2>
    <p class="sub">Pick the format that fits your schedule.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-camera-video"></i><h3>Instructor-Led Online</h3><p>Live virtual sessions with real-time interaction, guided exercises, and recorded replays.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-play-circle"></i><h3>Self-Paced Online</h3><p>On-demand video lessons, downloadable resources, and forum support at your own speed.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-building"></i><h3>In-Person Workshops</h3><p>Immersive hands-on sessions at our facilities or on-site at your organization.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">7</div><div class="m-nl">Courses</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">4–12</div><div class="m-nl">Weeks each</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">80%</div><div class="m-nl">Hands-on</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Find the right course<br>for your team</h2>
    <p>Custom cohorts, flexible scheduling, and group pricing available for organizations.</p>
    <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-b">Book a call</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Expert instructors &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Certification included &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Updated quarterly
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
